query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, u.departamentoId, u.liderId, d.nome as departamento_nome
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN departamentos d ON u.departamentoId = d.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%GABRIELA%' OR u.name LIKE '%EMERSON%'
ORDER BY u.name;
